form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished seventh over 515m at this track, beaten 10 lengths. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished seventh over 515m at this track, beaten 10 lengths. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on rounding the turn out of the front straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Taree Super Track over 525m in 30.80 last start, beating Aussie Wood. Was in the money two on end before breaking through last start. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Taree Super Track over 525m in 30.80 last start, beating Aussie Wood. Was in the money two on end before breaking through last start. Stick with her.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 515m at this track. Can't recommend her in this.

formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 515m at this track. Can't recommend her in this.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.75 lengths at this track (23.43) beating Ash's Coin in a Maiden on March 21. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.75 lengths at this track (23.43) beating Ash's Coin in a Maiden on March 21. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (30.18) over 515m at this track. Drawn wide. Deserves respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (30.18) over 515m at this track. Drawn wide. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Returns from a five months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fourth (30.25) over 515m at this track. Sure to make her presence felt.
